purpose: Record the source-facing meaning boundary for shared_B plus reverse_partner.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
This records source-facing meaning for the sparse 120-record carrier law.
Source-facing meaning is not the same as source-native WXYZTI generation.
No independent witness layer is proven.

summary.source_native_reading: anchor-and-reverse transport on oriented length-2 source-shell records
summary.combined_meaning: within an anchor bucket, vary outgoing two-step records; by reversal, move the anchor to the opposite endpoint; repeat
summary.shared_B_meaning: same oriented source endpoint B; records live in the same source-anchor bucket
summary.reverse_partner_meaning: same length-2 path with B and C exchanged; orientation flips across the same hinge A and same two columns
summary.quotient_meaning: shared_B creates local cliques over each B anchor, while reverse_partner supplies the inter-bucket transport on B labels
summary.terminal_reason: shared_B plus reverse_partner has source-facing meaning as anchor-and-reverse transport, but it remains a 120-record source-shell carrier rather than a full G900 evaluator or WXYZTI generator.

boundary_record.short_form: shared_B plus reverse_partner means anchor-and-reverse transport.
keeper_lines: reverse_partner supplies orientation-flip transport between buckets.
Together they form anchor-and-reverse transport on oriented length-2 source-shell records.
The law is source-facing and row/support-free.
The quotient B carrier is connected.
The law reaches all 120 records and settles to the admitted four.
positive_results: The sparse law has a clean source-facing meaning.
The law uses only oriented record data.
There are 15 B buckets of size 8.
The quotient B carrier is connected.
The union reaches all 120 records from the admitted residue.
The union settles all shells to the admitted four.
negative_results: No full 900-state return cycle was found.
No independent witness layer was found.
No full G900 admission was found.
No source-native WXYZTI generator was derived.
blocked_promotions: Do not call this full G900.
Do not call Gap A closed.
Do not call source-facing meaning a source-native generator.
Do not call the 120-record carrier a 900-state evaluator.
allowed_next_work: Search for an independent witness layer over the sparse carrier.
Search for a 900-state lift from anchor-and-reverse transport.
Return to WXYZTI generator derivation with anchor-and-reverse transport as a constraint.

interpretation.main_result: The winning sparse carrier law has source-facing meaning.
interpretation.meaning: Within a B-anchor bucket, vary outgoing two-step records; by reversal, move the anchor to the opposite endpoint; repeat.
interpretation.why_this_matters: The sparse law is not just a successful subset. It expresses a lawful anchor-and-reverse transport pattern.
interpretation.why_not_closure: It is still a 120-record source-shell carrier, not full G900 and not a WXYZTI generator.
interpretation.next_move: Compare shared_B plus reverse_partner with shared_column, or search for a 900-state lift.

claim.short_form: shared_B plus reverse_partner means anchor-and-reverse transport.
claim.not_closed_reason: It is still a 120-record source-shell carrier, not full G900 and not a WXYZTI generator.
claim.next_problem: Compare shared_B plus reverse_partner with shared_column, or search for a 900-state lift.
